summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Islamic scholarly website homepage 'Fuyud Al-Ta'wil Al-Mu'asir'. All visual elements, responsiveness, and interactions tested successfully.
passed_tests: Hero section loads with olive-green gradient background
Logo medallion with Arabic text 'فيوض التأويل المعاصر' displays prominently
English subtitle 'FUYUD AL-TA'WIL AL-MU'ASIR' displays correctly
Two action buttons (استكشف التفاسير and تعرف علينا) are visible and clickable
All four gold corner ornaments visible
Architectural SVG backgrounds (mosque silhouettes, Andalusian arches) render properly
Gold frame borders at top, bottom, left and right visible
Scroll indicator at bottom visible with 'SCROLL' text
Page is responsive and works on mobile viewport
Buttons remain clickable on mobile devices
Arabic text remains readable on mobile
All visual elements scale appropriately for mobile
